testcase.name: test_super_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: No access_token in response assert 'access_token' in {'message': 'Login successful', 'success': True, 'token_expires_in': 900, 'user': {'created_at': '2025-10-29T21:35:00.363000', 'email': 'superadmin@autotech.com', 'id': '22bda448-8650-45f9-bfd9-cbbf27e2963b', 'is_active': True, ...}}

testcase.failure: tests/test_license_management.py:53: in test_super_admin_login assert "access_token" in data, "No access_token in response" E AssertionError: No access_token in response E assert 'access_token' in {'message': 'Login successful', 'success': True, 'token_expires_in': 900, 'user': {'created_at': '2025-10-29T21:35:00.363000', 'email': 'superadmin@autotech.com', 'id': '22bda448-8650-45f9-bfd9-cbbf27e2963b', 'is_active': True, ...}}

testcase.name: test_get_salespeople_success
testcase.failure: tests/test_license_management.py:94: in test_get_salespeople_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get salespeople: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get salespeople: {"detail":"Could not validate credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
